description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a slightly flattened top and bottom, featuring a segmented surface with visible ridges running vertically. The pumpkin is a warm orange color with subtle shading, and it has a short, thick brown stem with a lighter tip. On one side, a traditional jack-o'-lantern face is carved, displaying triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged, toothy mouth. The carved openings reveal a hollow interior, typical of pumpkins prepared for Halloween. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is unadorned, showing only the natural texture and color variations of the rind. There are no visible accessories or additional decorations attached to the pumpkin.
description: A round orange pumpkin with a brown stem and a carved jack-o'-lantern face featuring triangular eyes, nose, and a jagged mouth. The surface is segmented and textured, with no additional decorations.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is seen from the back, showing its segmented orange surface and brown stem, with no carvings visible.
description_view_1: The front view reveals a carved jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged mouth, along with the brown stem.
description_view_2: This side view shows the pumpkin's orange surface and stem, with a hint of the carved opening visible on the left edge.
description_view_3: The pumpkin is viewed from the opposite side, displaying the orange surface and stem, with no carvings visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged, toothy mouth cut out of the front surface.
